case_title: COMMUNICATION STRATEGIES, LLC. VS. CHRONOS FITNESS, INC.

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD
